name: 21Shares Ethereum ETF
summary: PART I DESCRIPTION OF THE TRUST The Trust is an exchange-traded fund that issues common shares of beneficial interest (the Shares) that trade on the Cboe BZX Exchange, Inc. (the Exchange) under the symbol TETH.
